effects.title: Devastation!
effects.description: Roll twice and combine both effects (reroll any further 1s)

effects.title: Explosion!
effects.description: You take 1d8 damage

effects.title: Refraction!
effects.description: You target yourself with the spell

effects.title: Your hand slipped!
effects.description: You target a random ally with the spell

effects.title: Mind wound!
effects.description: You can't cast this spell again for a week

effects.title: Discorporation!
effects.description: One random piece of your gear disappears forever

effects.title: Spell worm!
effects.description: You lose the ability to cast a random spell on each of your turns until you pass a DC 12 Constitution check. You regain the ability to cast those spells after completing a rest

effects.title: Harmonic failure!
effects.description: You lose the ability to cast a random spell until you complete a rest

effects.title: Poof!
effects.description: You suppress all light within a near distance from you, including sunlight and magical light, for 10 rounds

effects.title: The horror!
effects.description: You scream uncontrollably for 3 rounds in Primordial, drawing lots of attention

effects.title: Energy surge!
effects.description: You glow bright purple for 10 rounds, granting enemies advantage on attacks against you

effects.title: Unstable conduit!
effects.description: You have disadvantage on casting spells of the same tier for 10 rounds

effects.title: Devastation!
effects.description: Roll twice and combine both effects (reroll any further 1s)

effects.title: Blast radius!
effects.description: You and all near creatures take 2d6 damage

effects.title: Duplicate refraction!
effects.description: You target yourself and the nearest ally with two identical copies of the spell

effects.title: You flubbed the incantation!
effects.description: You cast a random spell from your known spells at the same targets, even if it would not normally be possible

effects.title: Ethereal bandersnatch!
effects.description: Two random pieces of your gear disappear forever

effects.title: Arcano-mutagenesis!
effects.description: You must pass a DC 12 Constitution check or a random stat drops to 3 (-4) until you successfully complete a rest

effects.title: Boom!
effects.description: You open a 30-foot deep sinkhole in the ground with you at the center. You and all near creatures must pass a DC 15 Dexterity check or fall in

effects.title: Petrification!
effects.description: 1d4 of your limbs petrify for the next 24 hours

effects.title: Stupefaction!
effects.description: You lose the ability to cast all spells of the same tier until you complete a rest

effects.title: It cannot be unseen!
effects.description: You must pass a DC 12 Wisdom check or descend into mad raving for 1d10 rounds

effects.title: Radioactive energies!
effects.description: You whirl with repulsive energies, drawing the hostility and attacks of all enemies who can see you for the next 1d4 rounds

effects.title: Uncontained channeling!
effects.description: You have disadvantage on casting spells of the same tier and lower for 10 rounds

effects.title: Devastation!
effects.description: Roll twice and combine both effects (reroll any further 1s)

effects.title: Pyroclastic extrusion!
effects.description: You deal 3d8 damage to yourself and all creatures within near

effects.title: Astral incision!
effects.description: An otherworldly blade cuts into your memory. You permanently forget one random spell

effects.title: The grimlow!
effects.description: You accidentally summon a hostile grimlow in a space near to you. It persists for 2d4 rounds before disappearing whence it came

effects.title: Dark plasma aura!
effects.description: Attacks against you pass through a vile aura, dealing double damage for the next 2d6 rounds

effects.title: Gate!
effects.description: You open a magic portal to another location, whether on this plane or another. Something dreadful will come through in 1d4 rounds unless you close it with a DC 18 Intelligence check on your turn

effects.title: Runaway arcana loop!
effects.description: Your spell targets a random creature you can see, even if it would not normally be possible. Each subsequent turn, you must pass a spellcasting check for that spell or you cast it on another random creature in the same way (effect ends on success)

effects.title: Arcane obstruction!
effects.description: You lose the ability to cast all spells of a random tier until you complete a rest

effects.title: What lurks beyond the veil!
effects.description: You must pass a DC 15 Wisdom check or fall into mad raving for 1d4 hours

effects.title: Ord's balance!
effects.description: You must either permanently sacrifice a magic item or the ability to cast a tier 3+ spell you know

effects.title: Unmitigated chain reaction!
effects.description: You have disadvantage on casting all spells for the next 10 rounds

effects.title: Shred!
effects.description: You tear a large hole in the fabric of the universe close to you; the lightless tear grows larger every round

Penance: Penance requires a holy quest, ritualistic atonement, or a material sacrifice that you donate or destroy.

effects.title: Diabrura!
effects.description: Roll twice and combine both effects (roll any additional 1 again).

effects.title: Define!
effects.description: You suffer 1d6 damage for each degree of the magic

effects.title: Salamander!
effects.description: You transform into a small salamander with 1 hit point for 3 rounds. You cannot cast spells in this form.

effects.title: Evil gaze of Shune!
effects.description: You cannot cast this spell and another random spell for a week.

effects.title: Thieving fairies!
effects.description: You lose a random item from your equipment.

effects.title: Spider webs!
effects.description: Mental webs cloud your mind. You cannot cast this spell again for a week.

effects.title: Laughs!
effects.description: You fall to the ground in an attack of uncontrollable laughter, unable to do anything but laugh for the next 3 rounds.

effects.title: Doubled trouble!
effects.description: You lose the ability to cast a random spell until you complete a rest.

effects.title: Swamp gas!
effects.description: Sulfurous gas fills the air in a cube of size near you. All creatures that end their turn in this area become blinded and suffer 1d6 damage. It lasts for 3 rounds.

effects.title: Bat!
effects.description: An angry bat appears on your head, flapping its wings and clinging to your face. You are blinded for 3 rounds or until you manage to remove the creature.

effects.title: Salt!
effects.description: You are surrounded by a ring of salt and cannot touch it or cross it until something breaks the circle.

effects.title: Siphon!
effects.description: You have a disadvantage on casting spells of the same grade or lower for the next 10 rounds.

effects.title: Whirlwind!
effects.description: Roll twice and combine both effects (roll again for any additional 1).

effects.title: Ruin!
effects.description: You take 1d8 damage for each grade of the spell.

effects.title: Mental decay!
effects.description: You permanently forget a random spell.

effects.title: The Willowman!
effects.description: You summon the Willowman (who is furious with you) in a space near you. He remains for 1d6 rounds before disappearing back to where he came from.

effects.title: Cursed imps!
effects.description: Imps from hell laugh and surround you, stealing three random pieces of your equipment and flying away.

effects.title: Lightning explosion!
effects.description: You deal 3d6 damage to yourself and to all nearby creatures.

effects.title: Cold iron!
effects.description: Cold iron stakes are launched from the ethereal realm, piercing you. You take 2d6 damage and are paralyzed for 2 rounds.

effects.title: Mother of Night!
effects.description: You displease the Dark Mother and lose the ability to conjure this magic until you redeem yourself before her.

effects.title: Catatonia!
effects.description: You face nothingness and cannot take any action for the next hour.

effects.title: Dog tongue!
effects.description: Your tongue sticks out whenever you try to cast a spell of a random degree, ruining the magic. This effect lasts until you complete a rest.

effects.title: Nonsense!
effects.description: You have Disadvantage when casting any spell for the next 10 rounds.

effects.title: Nemesis!
effects.description: Somewhere, a child is born who will grow up to be a powerful sworn enemy against you.
